case_title: ZHI CHUN LIU VS. FEDERAL EXPRESS CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, ZHI CHUN AS TO DEFENDANT FEDERAL EXPRESS CORPORATION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIU, ZHI CHUN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FEDERAL EXPRESS CORPORATION $2,398.89 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,458.89, COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF PRODUCED EVIDENCE THAT DEFENDANT WAS RESPONSIBLE FOR THE ACCIDENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LIU, ZHI CHUN AS TO DEFENDANT FEDERAL EXPRESS CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-19-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT FEDERAL EXPRESS CORPORATION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-05-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FEDERAL EXPRESS CORPORATION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-19-2009 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-04-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-19-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-19-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. JED XIE INTERPRETS ENGLISH/CANTONESE - CANTONESE/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
